name: Abraham Dawson
alt_names: エイブラハム・ドースン
description: Abraham Dawson is the younger brother of Alexis, who defied his brother's wishes to destroy Banana Fish, and continues to develop and weaponize the drug for the Corsican mob into his adulthood. As a doctor during the Vietnam War, he tested Banana Fish on unknowing soldiers, including Griffin in Banana Fish. ~!He was later shot by Ash Lynx for experimenting on Shorter Wong.!~
